headline: Oil Plunges 3% on Looming Iran Deal

article.title: Oil Extends Decline After Trump Says Deal With Iran Is Close
article.summary: Oil extended declines after President Donald Trump said a peace deal with Iran could be signed as soon as the weekend following US military strikes that cast doubt over progress to end the war.

headline: Copper Jumps 5% on Trump's Iran Deal Threat

article.summary: Copper rallied and mining equities surged after President Donald Trump claimed the US was on the cusp of ending the war with Iran that has clouded prospects for the global economy.
